task.objective: Implement the bootstrap vertical slice from 34_BOOTSTRAP_BACKLOG.md: governance and repo skeleton, foundation library (diagnostics, SHA-256, UUIDs, canonical JSON, named random streams, curves), document model with .canopyproj I/O, deterministic evaluation of Tree+Branch generators, spline/frame/sweep meshing, OBJ export with manifest, canopy-cli, tests, and the bootstrap integration gate. Plus showcase sample documents and integration docs.

outputs: src/foundation, src/document, src/geometry, src/evaluation, src/export, apps/cli
tests/unit (8 suites), tests/integration (project I/O + CLI gate)

validation.command: cmake --preset headless-dev && cmake --build --preset headless-dev && ctest --preset headless-dev
validation.result: 100% tests passed, 0 tests failed out of 12

validation.command: cmake --preset headless-san && cmake --build --preset headless-san && ctest --preset headless-san

validation.result: document_hash stable across runs; model_hash eb404b4ba27ee60b reproduced; repeated export byte-identical; OBJ verified by independent Python parser (638 verts, 1140 faces)

sources_consulted: Wang et al. 2008 double-reflection rotation-minimizing frames (published)

risks: In-house JSON parser needs fuzz coverage before untrusted input (tracked B-008/B-010)
Interval-placement stable ordinals not yet invariant when generation.first changes (B-025 work)
Cross-platform hash vectors asserted on Linux only; Windows/macOS CI pending (B-005)
